entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by specific properties that require timely and precise field operations for crop establishment.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The climatic period during which crops are established in SAT Alfisols.

entities.name: WHEELED TOOL CARRIERS
entities.description: Animal-drawn, multipurpose machinery used for various tillage and sowing operations in Alfisols.

entities.name: TILLAGE OPERATIONS
entities.description: Agricultural activities involving soil preparation, performed using wheeled tool carriers.

entities.name: OXEN
entities.description: Average-sized animals used as the draft power for wheeled tool carriers.

entities.name: PLANTER-AND-FERTILIZER APPLICATOR
entities.description: A specific attachment for wheeled tool carriers used for seed metering and fertilizer application.

entities.name: SOWING
entities.description: The agricultural process of planting seeds, facilitated by a planter-and-fertilizer applicator.

entities.name: ROLLING CRUST BREAKER
entities.description: A mechanical tool designed to break the surface crust of the soil to improve seedling emergence.

entities.name: SEEDLING EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of a young plant breaking through the soil surface, which can be enhanced by a rolling crust breaker.

entities.name: SURFACE CRUST
entities.description: A hardened layer on the soil surface that can impede the emergence of seedlings.

entities.name: PRIMARY TILLAGE
entities.description: Intensive initial soil preparation that can provide advantages for early crop growth in Alfisols.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The developmental process of the crop, which is influenced by the intensity of primary tillage.

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: The agricultural plants being established and grown in Alfisols.
